_README: This is the list of free tools shown on tools.html. To add or edit a tool, change the entries below. 'file' is the path inside the private 'tools' bucket in Supabase Storage (e.g. addons/My-Tool.zip). Leave 'file' as an empty string "" to show the tool as 'Coming soon' (no download yet). 'icon' is any emoji. Keep the commas and quotes exactly as shown.

addons.name: TAH Mass Replay Downloader
addons.blurb: Queue NinjaTrader Market Replay data downloads across many instruments and date ranges at once. Skips weekends, detects sessions you already have, and shows per-row progress with a live log.
